message:
test(conformance): differential harness for sys/mman.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc sys/mman.h diff matrix.

4 functions, 6 tests:
- mmap_anon_lifecycle: 3 sizes (1/4/16 pages) anonymous private RW
  mapping; verifies success match, writability via memset+readback,
  munmap return code parity
- mmap_invalid_args: len=0 + bogus flags; both impls must agree on
  MAP_FAILED + errno
- mprotect_lifecycle: RW → R-only → RW transition on a mapped region
- madvise_dontneed: MADV_DONTNEED on a written-to mapping
- munmap_unmapped: munmap on a known-bad address; both impls must
  agree on rc/errno (POSIX-permissive)

Per case we compare success/failure parity, errno on failure, and
observable buffer state. We do NOT compare returned addresses
(kernel-assigned, will differ between calls).

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
